line: Squee don't understand why ya gots ta stare at dat glowy flat rock all day. Squee tried starin' at a rock once. It din't do nuthin'.
Dat magic box got more lights on it dan de whole Weatherlight. Squee tinks sumpthing wicked lives inside.
You keep pokin' at it wit your fingers. Is it a trapped fire? Squee seen trapped fire once. Burned Squee's eyebrows right off.
Dis is what kinda place? De magic box makes a noise like it's angry, but ya just keep pokin' it. Squee wouldn't poke an angry ting.
Squee tinks dat glowy box is haunted. De little pictures keep movin' around widout nobody touchin' 'em. Dat ain't natural.
De magic box got hotter dan Squee's cookin' fire! Squee tought it wuz gonna 'splode. Squee hid under de table just inna case.
Why you talkin' ta de box? It ain't listenin'. Squee talks ta rocks sometimes too. Dey don't listen needer.
Squee seen you stare at dat magic box longer dan Squee ever slept. Dat ain't healthy. Even goblins gotta blink.
De magic box keeps makin' sounds like it's sick. Maybe it needs some grubs. Squee's grubs fix everythin'.
Squee tried ta pick up de magic box once ta see what's under it. Dere wuz nuthin' under it. Dat's real suspicious.
What's all dem little crawly letters on de magic box face? Dey look like baby ants wearin' clothes. Is dis elf magic?
Squee don't trust nuthin' dat runs widout legs. Dat magic box got no legs and it still GOES. Dat's wrong.
De box went black and wouldn't wake up. Squee poked it a hunnerd times. Is it dead? Does it come back like Squee comes back?
Somebody put a tiny picture of a bitten fruit on de magic box. Dat's disrespectful ta fruit. Squee wanted ta eat dat fruit.
Dis magic box has got a hunnerd little mouth-holes on it. Squee tinks it breathes tru dem. Or maybe it eats tru dem. Squee put a bug in one once. Nuthin' happened.
De magic box made a BOOM sound and scared Squee so bad Squee knocked over de whole cook table. Den everybody wuz mad at Squee. De box never gets in trouble. Dat's not fair.
Squee don't know what you did ta dat magic box but it's movin' real slow now. Like it ate too much. Squee knows dat feelin'.
You gots a SECOND magic box? Squee din't even gots ONE magic box! Dis don't seem right at all.
Squee wuz gonna clean de magic box wit a wet rag. Everybody started screamin'. Apparently you can't do dat. Squee din't know.
De magic box needs a rope ta eat from de wall. Squee tinks de wall is feedin' it. Squee traced de rope and couldn't find where de food comes from. Dat's magic alright.
Somebody put de whole world on a flat piece of stone and now ya can look at anyplace ya want. Squee tinks dat's too much power for one person.
Dat invisible web ting gots everythin' on it. Squee found a picture of a fish bigger dan de Weatherlight. Den Squee couldn't sleep for a week.
Squee don't understand how de web ting works. Somebody said it goes tru de air. TREW DE AIR. How come Squee can't see it den?
Squee wuz on de invisible web ting and found a picture of Squee! Somebody drew Squee! It din't look like Squee at all but it said Squee's name so Squee assumes it wuz about Squee.
De invisible web ting knows everythin'. Squee asked it how many bugs is inna forest. It told Squee. Squee still don't believe dat number.
Squee tried ta grab a picture off de invisible web ting. Ya can't grab it. It ain't real. Squee spent twenty minutes tryin' ta grab a picture of a cake.
De invisible web ting went down and everybody panicked like Phyrexians wuz at de door. Squee's been inna Phyrexian invasion. Dat wuz worse. Calm down.
Somebody said de invisible web ting never forgets nuthin'. Squee did sumpthing embarrassing once. Squee now tinks about dis a lot.
Ya can talk ta somebody on de udder side of de whole world tru de invisible web ting. Squee don't got nuthin' ta say ta dem people but de option is nice.
Squee tried ta put a bug inna invisible web ting ta see if it would come out someplace else. It din't. De bug just got squished. Squee ate it.
Squee gots a little talkin' rock in his pocket now. It knows where Squee is at all times. Dat ain't okay. Nobody should know where Squee is at all times.
De talkin' rock YELLED at Squee and Squee trew it across de room. Den it kept yellin'. Ya can't make it stop yellin' unless ya know de right pokin' spots.
Somebody sent Squee a message tru de talkin' rock. It came from nowhere! From de AIR! How? Squee don't understand! Nobody explains nuthin' ta Squee!
Squee's talkin' rock died cuz Squee forgot ta feed it from de wall rope. Squee wuz very sorry. It came back from de dead same as Squee does. Maybe talkin' rocks is immortal too.
De talkin' rock gots a little window on it dat shows ya yer own face. Squee looks at Squee's face every day now. Squee is more handsome dan Squee tought.
Somebody took a tiny painting of Squee wit dere talkin' rock. De painting wuz done in one breath! In ONE BREATH! Most painters take weeks!
De talkin' rock can hear ya from across de room and still understand ya. Squee talked to it from under a blanket. It still heard. Dis is spooky.
Squee dropped de talkin' rock inna puddle and everybody acted like Squee killed somebody. Squee has been killed dozens of times and nobody got THAT upset.
De talkin' rock keeps suggestin' words before Squee is even done talkin'. It thinks it knows what Squee wants ta say. Nobody knows what Squee wants ta say. Not even Squee.
Squee gots a new talkin' rock and it's bigger dan de old one. Squee can now use it as a weapon if needed. Squee has used worse weapons.
People is always lookin' at dere talkin' rocks instead of de world. Squee once watched a man walk inta a post while starin' at his rock. Squee laughed for a long time.
Somebody showed Squee a place on de invisible web ting where ya shows everybody yer face all day. Squee don't want dat. Squee's face is for select people only.
What's dis picture-scroll? It just keeps goin' down forever? Forever?! Squee tried ta reach de bottom. Dere is no bottom. Squee sat dere for four hours.
Somebody put a little heart on Squee's picture. Dat means dey like it. Squee got one heart. One! Squee tinks he deserves more hearts than dat.
De web-scroll place has people arguing about everything. Which food is better, which weapon is better, whether de sky is blue. Squee din't know dis much arguing wuz possible widout swords.
Somebody is famous now because dey danced inna little picture. Squee danced inna real battle. NOBODY made Squee famous for dat.
People sends pictures of cats doin' tings on de picture-scroll. Squee seen hundreds of cats. Cats don't look at Squee like dat inna real life. Only when dey want food.
De web-scroll showed Squee a picture of sumpthing somebody ate for dinner. Squee could not identify de food. Squee has eaten bugs, rats, and tar. Dat did not look better.
Squee made an account on de picture place. Den nobody followed Squee. Squee is a FAMOUS HERO. How can nobody know Squee?!
Somebody unfollowed Squee after Squee posted about grubs. Grubs is important. If ya can't appreciate grubs, Squee don't want ya anyway.
Squee saw a big fight happen onna web-scroll between two people who din't even know each udder. Squee has fought people personally and it was less passionate. What's goin' on wit people?
Dere's a magic picture fight place where ya can fight udder people wit pictures instead of swords. Squee tinks swords are more honest but pictures is safer for Squee.
Squee watched somebody play a magic picture fight game for six hours straight. Six hours! Squee once ran from Phyrexians for six hours and felt better after.
De little fighter in de magic picture fight keeps fallin' inta holes. Squee tinks de fighter needs better boots. Also maybe look where yer goin'.
Somebody gave Squee a box wit buttons on it and said push de buttons ta fight. Squee pushed all de buttons at once. Sumpthing exploded. Squee tinks Squee won.
De magic picture fight has a tiny goblin character! Squee likes him. He looks dumb tho. Real goblins don't look like dat. Squee is much better lookin'.
Somebody said dey got de 'high score' in de magic picture fight. Squee don't know what dat means but Squee tinks Squee could do better. Squee is very competitive.
Squee don't understand why ya need ta practice de magic picture fight. In a REAL fight ya don't get ta practice first. Squee knows. Squee died during de real fight many times.
De magic picture fight made Squee's hands all sweaty. Den de button-box slipped and Squee lost de fight. De button-box is ta blame. Not Squee.
Somebody spent actual gold coins on a special hat for dere magic picture fighter. It's just a picture hat! It don't even keep de rain off! What is happenin'!
De magic picture fight place has a map made of tiny dots. Squee can move around de map. Squee kept walkin' Squee's little man inta de water. De little man don't swim good.
Squee watched a big tournament of magic picture fights. People screamed louder dan at a real battle. Squee don't understand people sometimes.
People play dis game where dey make little towns in a magic picture box. Squee always burns de town down first. Squee tinks dat's what yer supposed ta do.
Dere's a game where ya survives inna big field while everybody tries ta kill ya last. Squee is already an expert at survivin'. Put Squee inna dat game. Squee will win.
Somebody said dere game 'crashed.' Dat means de magic picture fight fell down. Squee has been crashed into walls by Phyrexians. Dat's a real crash.
De magic picture fight has a dragon in it. Squee is unimpressed. Squee has SEEN real dragons. Magic picture dragons don't even breathe right.
Somebody stayed up all night ta finish a magic picture fight. Squee did night watches on de Weatherlight. Dat is also miserable. Squee relates.
Dere is a game played wit little flat pictures on a table. Like spells on paper! Squee tried ta eat one of de cards. It tasted like paper. Squee don't recommend it.
Squee heard dere's a card game where one of de cards is Squee's own face. Squee demands ta see dis card. Squee wants ta know if it looks right.

De card game takes lots of little pieces and rules and tings. Squee heard de rules once. Den Squee forgot de rules. Den somebody explained dem again. Den Squee forgot again. Squee is havin' a rough time.
Squee tinks board games is like goblin war councils except everybody is sittin' down and nobody is on fire. Squee respects dat.
De board game takes too long. Squee played for six hours and nobody won yet. Squee woulda settled dis wit a wrestling match in twenty minutes.
Squee saw somebody flip a board game table cuz dey wuz losin'. Squee respects dat. Squee has flipped tables too. Squee flipped dem for less important reasons.
De dice-rollin' game has a goblin tribe option. Squee auditioned ta be de tribe leader. Squee wuz told it's pretend. Squee still wants ta be tribe leader.
Somebody is playin' a pretend-fighting game where ya make up yer own goblin. Squee says don't bother makin' up a goblin. Squee is already right here.
De vibrating music box makes thumpin' sounds dat Squee feels inna chest. Squee tought Squee wuz havin' a heart attack. Squee has been killed many times and dis wuz different. Scarier somehow.
Dis music goes boom boom boom boom and nuthin' else. Squee could do dat by hittin' a pot wit a spoon. Squee has done dat. Nobody called Squee a musician.
De singin' person hits very high notes. Like a bat. Squee don't mean dat bad. Bats is impressive. Squee just don't wanna be near it.
Squee heard a song where somebody just talks very fast over some thumpin'. Squee tinks Squee could do dat. Squee talks very fast when scared. Which is often.
Dis slow sad song made Squee feel tings Squee usually feels only when Karn goes away. Squee don't like feelin' dose tings. Turn it off.
People is movin' dere whole body ta de music in ways Squee don't understand. Squee can dance. Squee's dance looks like somebody kickin' Squee. Dat's on purpose.
Somebody put on a song wit lots of SCREAMING in it. Squee wuz not warned. Squee is still under de table. Is it safe ta come out?
Dis music is very angry. De singer is very mad. Squee don't know what dey is mad about but Squee supports dem bein' mad about it.
Somebody plays a music-speakin' box on dere talkin' rock all day. Squee tinks dere is a tiny musician livin' inside dat talkin' rock and Squee feels bad for dem.
De music makes de room shake. Squee put a cup of water on de floor ta watch de ripples. Like in dat scary big-lizard story Squee heard once.
Somebody went ta a live music-yellin' show and came back wit no voice. Dey spent all dere gold ta make dere own voice disappear. Squee don't understand luxury.
De little picture-story place on de magic box has hunnerd-and-hundreds of shows. Squee tried ta watch all of dem. Squee has been sittin' here a long time.
Squee watched a show about people who gets put on a island and have ta survive. Squee tinks Squee would win dat show immediately. Squee is already surviving all de time.
De moving picture show had a goblin in it. De goblin wuz de bad guy. Squee is very tired of goblins bein' de bad guy. Squee is mostly de victim actually.
De big moving picture show blew up de whole world and Squee yelled 'I seen worse!' and nobody believed Squee but it's true because Squee WAS DERE for actual world-endin' events.
Squee watched a show about people makin' food dat looks fancy. Squee tinks most of it looks worse dan Squee's grub stew. But Squee is biased toward grub stew.
De story show ended and dey said 'ta be continued.' CONTINUED?! Squee waited! Squee cleared de whole afternoon! Dis is cruel!
Somebody told Squee de ending of de show before Squee watched it. Squee is still upset. Dat's like telling somebody de battle ends before de battle starts. Where's de fun in livin' den?
De moving picture show is very scary and Squee hid behind a blanket for most of it. Squee is already scared of real tings. Squee don't need fake tings ta also be scary.
Squee watched a show about people who argue in a big house for many weeks. Squee was on a ship for years wit people he argued wit. Nobody made a show about DAT.

De comedy show made people laugh wit de same stupid joke over and over and dey kept playin' a laughin' sound ta remind ya it wuz funny. Squee did not need reminding when something is funny. Squee knows funny.
De teacher told Squee ta sit down and be quiet and Squee wanted ta say: people been tellin' Squee dat for a HUNDRED YEARS. Squee's been hearin' dat lecture. It don't work.
Somebody gotta do work dey don't wanna do for somebody who tells dem what ta do all day. Squee knows dis feelin'. Squee wuz a cabin boy. A CABIN BOY. On a flying ship. Wit dragons.
De teacher gave Squee a paper wit a big red mark on it. De mark wuz bad. Squee took de paper home and a rat ate it. Problem solved.
Somebody wuz late ta class and had ta explain why. Squee has explained to captains and heroes why tings went wrong. Squee always tells de truth: it wuz someone else's fault.
Homework is de worst ting. Ya already did de school tings at school. Now ya gotta go home and do MORE school tings. Who invented dis? Squee wants ta talk ta dem.
De test paper had questions Squee never seen before. Squee looked at de questions. De questions looked at Squee. Squee drew a picture of a bug and handed it in.
Everybody in de big learnin' hall gots assigned places ta sit. Squee din't choose Squee's seat. Squee found a corner seat anyway. Corners is safer. Squee has rules about corners.
Ya gotta read a whole big book by tomorrow? Squee din't even read de SMALL book by last week. Squee is very behind on Squee's readin'. Squee is fine wit dis.

Somebody gotta do a big talkin' performance in front of de whole class. Squee has addressed crowds. Squee once gave a speech ta de Mercadian goblins. It went very well. Squee tells people dis constantly.
De school has a place where ya eat in de middle of de day. Squee approves of dis system strongly. Squee would attend more school if dere wuz more eating-in-de-middle-of-day.
Squee gots sent ta de place where ya sit and wait when ya done sumpthing wrong. Squee has spent a lot of time waitin' in places. Squee napped.
De work place gots rules dat don't make sense. Don't put yer feet up. Don't eat at de table. Don't bring bugs inna building. Squee broke all three rules on de first day.
Ya gotta be at de work place at de same time every day. Every. Day. Squee wuz on a ship where de schedule changed wit de battles. Squee prefers de battle schedule honestly.
Squee's boss told Squee ta do sumpthing AND den told Squee ta do it different. Same day. Squee went an' hid inna supply closet. Sometimes Squee does dis.
Dere's a meetin' dat could've been a note. Squee knows dis because dey sent a note about de meetin' and de note already said everythin' inna meetin'.
Somebody gots a deadline. Squee understands deadlines. On de Weatherlight dere wuz deadlines too except de deadline wuz 'if we don't do dis everybody dies.' Dat's a real deadline.
De boss came over ta see what Squee wuz doin'. Squee wuz nappin'. Squee told de boss Squee wuz 'tinking deeply.' De boss walked away confused. Dis works more often dan Squee expected.
De work place gots a machine dat makes hot brown water dat people drink ta stay awake. Squee tried it. It tasted like burned sad. Squee is very awake now.
Somebody gots passed over for a promotion dat went ta somebody else. Squee knows dis feelin'. Gerrard wuz in charge and Squee done half de work. More dan half. Probly all de work.

Dere is a thing where ya spend all day writin' letters ta people on de magic box. People write back. Squee tried writin' a letter. Squee typed it by sittin' on de button-board. It said 'jjjjjjjjjjjjjk.'
De sky is cryin' today. Squee finds dis very relatable. Squee has days like dis.
It is rainin' and Squee can't go outside widout gettin' soaked. Squee wuz soaked once inna shipwreck. Dis is less dramatic but equally wet.
De white cold stuff is fallin' from de sky again. Squee picked up some. Squee ate some. Squee does not recommend eatin' de cold white stuff. It wuz nuthin'. Just cold nothin'.
Everything got covered inna cold white stuff overnight. Squee's footprints went all around de yard and back inna circle because Squee got lost. De footprints told de whole story.
It is too hot. Squee is sweatin' like a Phyrexian swamp monster. Squee has been inna actual Phyrexian swamp. Dis is comparable.
It is so cold dat Squee's breath comes out as little clouds. Squee tried ta catch de clouds. Ya can't catch dem. Squee tried for an hour.
A big lightning bolt hit real close ta Squee. Squee's hair stood up. Squee didn't know Squee had enough hair ta stand up. Now Squee knows.
De wind knocked over Squee's whole lunch pile. Squee is very mad at de wind. Squee tinks de wind done it on purpose. De wind don't like Squee.
Somebody said 'don't forget yer coat it's cold outside.' Squee has faced de cold void of space inna magic ship. A coat ain't gonna cover it. But Squee takes de coat.
De big storm outside wuz goin' boom boom boom all night. Squee lined up Squee's rocks just inna case. Squee always got rocks lined up inna case.
Somebody said dis spring has been weird weather. Squee has seen weirder. Squee has seen weather made by evil machines. Squee ain't impressed by regular weird weather.
De fog came in overnight and now Squee can't see ten steps ahead. Squee navigated de Stronghold blindfolded. Squee can handle fog. Squee is fine.
Somebody showed Squee a tiny fluffy animal. It is very small. Squee is askin' if it bites. Animals dat look dat harmless always bites.
Dis creature is called a 'dog.' It is jumpin' all over Squee. Squee has met wolves, hellhounds, and a ting called a Mogg Fanatic. Dis is friendlier dan all of dose.

De dog follows Squee everywhere. EVERYWHERE. Squee went ta de corner of de yard and de dog was dere. Squee went inside. Dog wuz inside. Squee went ta sleep. Dog wuz at de end of de bed. Squee respects de commitment.
De cat looked at Squee like Squee wuz nuthin'. Squee has been looked at like dat by Crovax, Volrath, and various monsters. De cat's look wuz worse somehow.
De cat sat on Squee's things. Den de cat sat on Squee's food. Den de cat sat on Squee. Squee is being sat on by de cat right now. Squee don't know what ta do.
De cat bats tings off de table for no reason. Squee does tings for no reason sometimes too. Squee and de cat understand each udder.
Somebody's pet made a loud noise at three in de morning. Squee wuz already awake lookin' out for danger. Squee is always already awake at three in de morning.
De pet fish just floats dere and stares. Squee stares back. Squee and de fish have a complicated relationship now.

People carry dere tiny animals around inna little bag. De animals look out of de bag wit big eyes. Squee has been carried places before. It wuz not dignified. But de animals look happier about it dan Squee did.
De bird keeps talkin'. It just keeps talkin'. De words don't mean nuthin'. It's like it's tryin' ta be Squee. Dere can only be one Squee.
Somebody's pet snake got loose. Everybody panicked. Squee has been through de Phyrexian invasion. A snake loose inna house is not a crisis. But Squee stayed on de table anyway.
De hamster runs on a little wheel all day and gets nowhere. Squee has done missions like dis. Squee sympathizes deeply.
De pet went ta de healin' person and cost more gold than Squee's whole goblin crew makes in a month. De pet did not even say thank ya. Like Squee when Squee gots saved. Squee sees de parallel.
Dis sport has people runnin' around kickin' a big round ball. Squee ran around plenty. Nobody paid Squee ta do it. Squee is reconsiderin' Squee's career choices.
Dese fighters is in a ring and can only use dere fists and feet. Squee has been inna lots of fights wit no weapons. Squee considers dis unfair but understandable.
De two teams is beatin' each udder up wit special rules about how dey's allowed ta beat each udder up. Squee tinks rules in a fight is optimistic thinkin'.
De crowd is screamin' so loud for de sports fighters. Squee's crew never screamed like dat for Squee when Squee won a fight. And Squee won many fights. Involuntarily mostly but still.
Squee watched people try ta throw a ball into a little hoop way up inna air. Den run back. Den do it again. Den run back. For hours. Squee gets tired just watchin'. How do DERE legs still work?
People is runnin' a very very long distance for fun. Not from sumpthing. Not toward sumpthing. Just runnin'. Squee only runs when dere is a reason. Usually a scary reason.
De sport tournament is today and people is very intense about it. Squee has been inna real battle tournaments. De stakes here is lower but de snacks is better.
Somebody put on de sports watching show and cheered very loud and den immediately looked very sad. All in five seconds. Squee watched dis happen six times in a row.
De sport person hit de ball so hard it went way into de sky. Squee has been hit into de sky. Different experience but Squee understands de trajectory.
People play de sport wit sticks on de ice and slide around. Squee tried ta walk on ice once. Squee slid all de way down a hill and inta a mud hole. So Squee relates ta de slidin'.
De sport has a person swimmin' very fast. Squee can't swim. Squee sinks like a goblin-shaped rock. Squee watches dis sport with deep respect and also envy.
Somebody told Squee dere team won and now dey is Squee's friend forever. Squee approves of dis friendship policy. Simple. Clear. Based on victory.
A friend said sumpthing dat hurt Squee's feelins. Squee didn't say nuthin'. Squee just looked at dem. Den Squee went behind de barrel and sat for a while. Dis is how Squee processes tings.
Squee's best friend in de whole world is Karn. Karn is big. Karn is silver. Karn will probly save de world again. Squee is real proud.
Somebody is mad at dere friend and now dey ain't talkin'. Squee has been inna tiffs wit crewmates. De way ta fix it is ta go do sumpthing dangerous togedder. Works every time.
Two people is havin' a big fight and Squee is caught inna middle. Squee is always caught inna middle. Squee has a talent for being inna middle of bad tings.
Somebody is bein' mean ta Squee's friend. Squee don't stand for dat. Squee stood up ta Crovax for Squee's friends. Squee will absolutely stand up ta dis person.
De new person inna group seems sketchy. Squee has a good nose for sketchy. Squee has met Phyrexians disguised as people. Squee's instincts is good.
Somebody has too many friends and can't keep up wit all of dem. Squee don't gots dis problem. Squee can count Squee's friends on one hand. It's a comfortable number.

People on de web-scroll is arguin' about who is right. Both sides tink dey is right. Squee has seen dis wit Gerrard and Tahngarth many times. De answer is usually dat neither of dem is right and Squee is right.
Somebody likes somebody and din't say nuthin' yet. Squee tinks ya should say de ting. Life is short. Unless yer Squee. Den life is very long. But ya should still say de ting.
De person ya likes din't text ya back yet. Squee don't know what 'text' means but Squee knows what waitin' feels like. Squee has waited for Karn ta come back. It always works out.
Somebody got ghosted by a person dey liked. De person just stopped respondin'. Dat happened ta Squee once. Squee followed up in person. Dis is not always recommended.
Two people is havin' a rivalry and both tink de udder one started it. Squee has been inna many rivalries. Usually Squee started it. Accidentally.
Somebody is ignoring Squee completely at de social gathering. Squee don't need validation. Squee is fine. Squee is gonna go eat something. Squee is definitely fine.
Dis is de best time of day. Dis is Squee's favorite ting. Squee is gonna lay down right here and nobody is gonna bother Squee for a very long time.
Squee has a very important nappin' schedule. It goes: early nap, mid-mornin' nap, almost-lunch nap, after-lunch nap, late afternoon consideration nap, and den night sleep.
People who say dey don't need sleep is liars and Squee don't trust dem. Even Squee — who has died many times — needs sleep. Sleep is sacred.
Squee woke up and it wuz still dark outside. Dat wuz wrong. Dat is not when ya wake up. De world made a mistake. Squee went back ta sleep.
De alarm sound went off at a time dat no sane creature should be awake. Squee trew de alarm under de bed. Squee went back ta sleep. Problem handled.
Squee tried ta stay up late but fell asleep sittin' up at de table. Squee's face landed in de gruel bowl. Squee woke up very confused and still a little hungry.
De perfect nap has: a soft flat ting ta lay on, nuthin' important due for a while, and nobody comin' ta ask Squee ta do stuff. All three conditions is rarely met.
Squee has been told ta 'take a nap' like it's a bad ting. Squee will gladly take dat nap. Squee will take it immediately and hold it close.
Being lazy is not lazy it is strategic rest. Squee is restoring Squee's energy for de next ting. Dere is always a next ting. Squee needs ta be ready.
Somebody woke Squee up ta ask Squee a question and de question wasn't worth wakin' Squee up for. Squee now has a list of acceptable reasons ta wake Squee up. It's a short list.
Squee din't sleep good last night because tings kept making noises. Squee is very tired and very crabby. Approach Squee wit caution today.
Somebody said 'we'll sleep when we're dead.' Squee has been dead. Ya don't sleep when ya dead. Ya just come back confused and covered inna whatever killed ya. Sleep now while ya can.
De bed is too warm and den too cold and den too warm again. How does dis happen? De bed ain't doin' nuthin. Squee is doin' all de work and still can't get comfortable.
Squee dreamed about a big feast wit all de best food. Den Squee woke up and dere wuz nuthin'. Just regular morning. Squee is disappointed by regular morning.
Somebody is having a big celebrating ting today! Squee like celebrating tings. Squee is gonna eat as much as possible and den sleep. Dis is Squee's celebration protocol.
It is de day where people put lights on everythin' and give each udder presents. Squee asked for a new pot and a warm blanket. Squee's needs is simple.
De big celebratin' day has special food dat only comes out dis time of year. Squee has been waitin' for dis. Squee has been prepared ta eat since last week.
People light off little exploding things dat make bright colors in de sky ta celebrate. It is beautiful and also terrifying. Squee is hiding but looking. Dis is Squee's two modes.
De big celebratin' meal has more food dan Squee has ever seen at one table. Squee is very excited. Squee is gonna have ta loosen Squee's belt. Squee is ready for dis.
People wear costumes on de scary holiday. Somebody dressed as a goblin. Squee is offended by de quality of de costume. Dat goblin looks nothin' like a real goblin. Squee looks nothin' like dat.
De scary holiday has kids goin' door ta door askin' for sweet tings. Squee respects de efficiency of dis approach. Ya just go ta people and ask for food. Straightforward.
De new year celebration has everybody yellin' and wavin' and makin' noise at exactly midnight. Squee wuz asleep at midnight. Squee was very startled.
Ya got ta pick what ta do different dis year. Squee's goal is: less dying, more eating, maybe get a better blanket. Squee has had dis same goal for a hunnerd years.
Dere is a special day just for celebrating de person dat borned ya. Squee don't remember being borned. But Squee is very much in favor of de free cake aspect of dis.
People put little fire-sticks on de birthday cake and ya gots ta blow dem out. Squee blew too hard and got cake on Squee's face. De cake wuz still good tho. Squee ate all de cake.
De gift-givin' holiday has people giving presents wrapped up inna paper. Squee tinks de wrappin' is also a gift cuz Squee spent twenty minutes rustlin' tru it before gettin' ta de real thing.
People is disappointed by dere gift but still sayin' 'oh dis is wonderful.' Squee can tell. Squee has pretended ta be okay wit tings many times. Squee recognizes de face.

Squee tried ta update de magic box and it started doin' a very slow tink. Den it stopped. Den it showed a picture of a circle goin' around. Den it stopped again. Den it wuz fine. Nobody can explain dis.
